case_title: GIVERTS, VLADIMIR et al VS UNITED AIR LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO PRENTISS HALL CORP SYSTEM INC. AGT FOR UNITED AIRLINES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIVERTS, VLADIMIR GIVERTS, STANISLAVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC. $1,951.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,046.00, DEFT. PREVIOUSLY TENDERED $331.97 TO PLTF'S AS REIMBURSEMENT FOR CERTAIN EXPENSES. PLTF MAY ACCEPT THAT PAYMENT & IT SHALL BE CREDITED AS PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEFENDANT FILED REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. ($10 FEE PAID BY CHECK) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING RETURNED SENT TO STANISLAVA GIVERTS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO STANISLAVA GIVERTS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2007 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,035.00 FILED BY GIVERTS, VLADIMIR GIVERTS, STANISLAVA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GIVERTS, VLADIMIR GIVERTS, STANISLAVA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-14-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-28-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
